title: add default_diagnostics for CanopyModel

body:
Remove allow scalar indexing (which wasn't needed before as well). Use mapreduce, which should be more optimized. Credit to @riteshbhirud who created this change in #1215. That PR was innactive for a few months, and only needed the formatter applied. This copies those changes, and applies the formatting.

Our benchmarks currently do not test with the NaN check callback.  I tried doing some very non-rigorous gpu benchmarking with the NaN check callback. I found that this change generally makes the first call, which compiles,  take longer. All subsequent calls are faster after the change. So it seems like this change makes things worse on gpu if using the NaN check cb very infrequently on a low resolution model, but better for long high res runs.


----
- [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Refactor `count_nans_state`

## Purpose 
Pdfs do not render in docs. this pr changes our default plotting to png.
this allows us to remove Poppler_jll from our dependencies
I also removed a warning from ClimaLand.Diagnostics to suppress output that is not useful 
upgrade ClimaUtilities
